title: Screener signal intake
description: The raw signal handed to the screener pipeline. Materialized at launch (by the cockpit server or the /screener:signal command) as screener/runs/<SIG_ID>/intake.json. Mirrors meta.raw_input_source of the Phase 1 schema.

input_datetime.description: ISO 8601 with timezone — when the input was received.

source_name.description: Must be on the swarm's signal_gate allowed-source list, else Gate 0 fails. Empty only for human_prompt.

source_url.description: Direct URL to the article/filing/data page. Empty only for human_prompt.

human_prompt_note.description: Required when input_nature is human_prompt: the verbatim observation.

requested_by.description: Who created the signal (cockpit user email or 'cli').

from_inbox.description: True when promoted from a sweep inbox row.

sweep_ref.description: Inbox file + row id this signal came from, if any.

override_promote.description: Human override: run Phase 1 even if materiality lands in the PARK band.
